journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Impact of ICT Function Use on Employees’ Job Performance in International Engineering Enterprises: A Configurational Perspective
abstract: The widespread application of information and communication technology (ICT) enhances the efficiency of information transmission across geographically dispersed organizations and reduces communication costs, providing opportunities for international engineering enterprises to effectively support overseas project departments. However, existing studies have also recognized the negative impacts of ICT use on overseas employees’ performance, such as causing information overload and increasing job stress on employees. Traditional linear analysis methods struggle to reveal the interactions between distinct ICT functions and lack differentiated explanations for ICT management tactics under varying contextual conditions. This study introduces a configurational perspective, analyzing survey data from 179 employees in overseas project departments of international engineering enterprises. By using fuzzy-set qualitative comparative analysis (fsQCA), this study systematically investigates the dynamic alignment patterns among ICT support, ICT control, ICT-induced job stress, project size, and job complexity. The study reveals complementary and substitutive relationships between ICT functions and their impact paths on job performance across different contexts. Key findings include: (1) Three pathways lead to the high job performance of employees in overseas project departments, with path selection influenced by contextual conditions, including project size and job complexity; (2) low job performance is not symmetrically related to high performance but arises from control failure (high-frequency control with high stress) or the absence of ICT support function; and (3) ICT-induced job stress primarily stems from control function, while support function mitigates such stress. The results provide theoretical insights into the interplay of ICT functions, contextual conditions, and their impacts on job performance. Practical guidance is offered for enterprises to optimize ICT use for enhanced employee performance.
title_cn: 信息与通信技术功能使用对国际工程企业员工工作表现的影响：一种配置视角
abstract_cn: 信息与通信技术（ICT）的广泛应用提高了地理分散组织间信息传递的效率，降低了沟通成本，为国际工程企业有效支持海外项目部门提供了机会。然而，现有研究也认识到ICT使用对海外员工绩效的负面影响，例如导致信息过载和增加员工工作压力。传统的线性分析方法难以揭示不同ICT功能之间的相互作用，并且在不同情境条件下缺乏对ICT管理策略的差异化解释。本研究引入了配置视角，分析了来自179名国际工程企业海外项目部门员工的调查数据。通过使用模糊集定性比较分析（fsQCA），本研究系统地探讨了ICT支持、ICT控制、ICT引发的工作压力、项目规模和工作复杂性之间的动态对齐模式。研究揭示了ICT功能之间的互补和替代关系及其在不同情境下对工作绩效的影响路径。主要发现包括：（1）三条路径导致海外项目部门员工的高工作绩效，路径选择受项目规模和工作复杂性等情境条件的影响；（2）低工作绩效与高工作绩效并非对称关系，而是源于控制失败（高频控制伴随高压力）或缺乏ICT支持功能；（3）ICT引发的工作压力主要源于控制功能，而支持功能则缓解了这种压力。研究结果为ICT功能、情境条件及其对工作绩效的影响之间的相互作用提供了理论见解，并为企业优化ICT使用以提升员工绩效提供了实践指导。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Integrated Dual-Crane Positioning and Lifting Planning in Extreme Conditions: A Critical States and Spatial Constraint Optimization Approach
abstract: The intelligent planning of dual-crane cooperative lifting has emerged as a critical enabling technology for handling heavy and oversized payloads in complex engineering environments, particularly as infrastructure projects increase in scale and operational constraints become more challenging. However, existing planning methods neglect the critical influence of crane positioning on path feasibility. Besides, they remain inadequate for extreme conditions where payloads approach maximum capacity, and even minor swings may trigger catastrophic instability. This study proposes a hierarchical optimization framework for dual-crane positioning and lifting planning under such extreme scenarios, integrating critical states and spatial constraints. The upper layer systematically optimizes crane positions and motions by resolving geometric constraints between cranes and payloads, including working radii, boom lengths, slewing angles, and hoisting length. A weighted multiobjective function is formulated to balance energy consumption and time efficiency, and an improved A* algorithm is used to efficiently solve the integrated optimization problem through critical states discretization, where slewing motion is segmented into several phases. Furthermore, the lower layer enforces spatial synchronization through antiswing trajectory planning, where angular velocity profiles of both cranes are coordinated to maintain payload stability while adhering to crane-payload geometric constraints. Through simulation and software platform-based pseudo-experiments, the proposed method demonstrates a 66.57% improvement in computational efficiency and a 50.04% enhancement in safety performance compared to traditional approaches, while ensuring guaranteed collision avoidance and mechanical feasibility in extreme conditions. The proposed method significantly enhances safety and maximizes payload utilization under extreme conditions, providing a robust theoretical and practical framework that addresses fundamental challenges in modern dual-crane lifting operations.
topics: Dynamics and Control of Mechanical Systems
title_cn: 极端条件下的集成双起重机定位与提升规划：一种关键状态与空间约束优化方法
abstract_cn: 双起重机协同提升的智能规划已成为在复杂工程环境中处理重型和超大负载的关键技术，尤其是在基础设施项目规模不断扩大、操作约束日益严峻的背景下。然而，现有的规划方法忽视了起重机定位对路径可行性的关键影响。此外，它们在负载接近最大容量的极端条件下仍显得不足，甚至微小的摆动都可能引发灾难性的失稳。本研究提出了一种针对极端场景下双起重机定位与提升规划的分层优化框架，整合了关键状态和空间约束。上层通过解决起重机与负载之间的几何约束（包括工作半径、臂长、回转角度和提升长度）系统地优化起重机的位置和运动。构建了一个加权多目标函数，以平衡能耗和时间效率，并采用改进的A*算法通过关键状态离散化高效解决集成优化问题，其中回转运动被分为多个阶段。此外，下层通过抗摆轨迹规划强制实施空间同步，协调两台起重机的角速度曲线，以在遵循起重机-负载几何约束的同时保持负载稳定。通过仿真和基于软件平台的伪实验，所提方法在计算效率上比传统方法提高了66.57%，在安全性能上提升了50.04%，同时确保在极端条件下的碰撞避免和机械可行性。所提方法显著增强了安全性，并在极端条件下最大化了负载利用率，提供了一个强有力的理论和实践框架，解决了现代双起重机提升作业中的基本挑战。

title: ChatGPT as a Training Coach: Pattern-Specific Outcomes in Build America Buy America Act Training
abstract: This study explores the role of generative artificial intelligence (Gen-AI) as a compliance training agent by examining how interactive prompt patterns influence knowledge acquisition in the context of the Build America Buy America (BABA) Act. Amid growing interest in scalable, personalized learning tools, this experiment tests ChatGPT’s capacity to deliver regulatory education through adaptive coaching styles. The methodology integrates pre- and post-training assessments, control questions for knowledge retention, and coaching formats that range from scenario-based to interactive and gamified prompts. Results reveal that Gen-AI-driven training significantly improves compliance knowledge, particularly when prompt structures are aligned with learners’ prior understanding. Participants with low initial knowledge exhibited the greatest gains, indicating the value of real-time feedback and conversational scaffolding in supporting novice learners. Furthermore, control items confirm that learning was substantive rather than superficial, reinforcing Gen-AI’s potential for anchored instruction. However, the effectiveness of prompt types varied by knowledge tier, with structured formats outperforming more exploratory ones specifically among less-prepared participants. These findings carry meaningful implications for public-sector training: while Gen-AI training agents can extend access and personalize instruction, their design must consider learner readiness and cognitive load. The study also identifies prompt development as a core challenge, requiring balance between engagement, clarity, and instructional depth. As such, this research contributes both empirical evidence and practical guidance for integrating Gen-AI into compliance training, emphasizing the importance of pairing technological capability with pedagogical intent to ensure measurable learning outcomes.
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: ChatGPT作为培训教练：在《建设美国，购买美国法》培训中的模式特定结果
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了生成性人工智能（Gen-AI）作为合规培训代理的角色，通过考察互动提示模式如何影响《建设美国，购买美国法案》（BABA法案）背景下的知识获取。在对可扩展、个性化学习工具日益增长的兴趣中，本实验测试了ChatGPT通过适应性辅导风格提供监管教育的能力。研究方法结合了培训前后的评估、知识保留的控制问题，以及从情景基础到互动和游戏化提示的多种辅导形式。结果显示，基于Gen-AI的培训显著提高了合规知识，尤其是在提示结构与学习者的先前理解相一致时。初始知识较低的参与者表现出最大的进步，表明实时反馈和对话支架在支持初学者方面的价值。此外，控制项目确认学习是实质性的而非表面的，进一步强化了Gen-AI作为基础教学的潜力。然而，提示类型的有效性因知识层级而异，结构化格式在准备不足的参与者中表现优于更具探索性的格式。这些发现对公共部门培训具有重要意义：尽管Gen-AI培训代理可以扩展访问和个性化教学，但其设计必须考虑学习者的准备程度和认知负担。研究还将提示开发确定为一项核心挑战，需要在参与度、清晰度和教学深度之间取得平衡。因此，本研究为将Gen-AI整合到合规培训中提供了实证证据和实践指导，强调了将技术能力与教学意图相结合以确保可测量学习成果的重要性。

title: An adaptive trend-seasonal conditional diffusion framework for railway monitoring data imputation
title_cn: 一种用于铁路监测数据插补的自适应趋势-季节性条件扩散框架

title: Unraveling Stakeholder Engagement in Megaprojects: A Political Opportunity Structure Perspective in Turbulent Times
abstract: Infrastructure projects are often tied to political agendas, leading to community skepticism and opposition. This study explores how changes in the political system influenced engagement between project opposers and project promoters. Using a qualitative research approach and a case study strategy, archival data related to the prematurely terminated Bisri Dam megaproject in Lebanon were collected and analyzed. Results show that deepened division among political parties (configuration of power) and a wider distribution of power among project opposers (formal institutional structure) intensified opposition, leading to project cancellation. This study highlights the importance of considering a broad political perspective in project stakeholder engagement to improve megaproject outcomes from a socially sustainable standpoint.
title_cn: 揭示大项目中的利益相关者参与：动荡时期的政治机会结构视角
abstract_cn: 基础设施项目往往与政治议程密切相关，这导致了社区的怀疑和反对。本研究探讨了政治体制的变化如何影响项目反对者与项目推动者之间的互动。采用定性研究方法和案例研究策略，收集并分析了与黎巴嫩提前终止的比斯里大坝大型项目相关的档案数据。结果表明，政治党派之间的深度分裂（权力配置）和项目反对者之间更广泛的权力分配（正式制度结构）加剧了反对情绪，最终导致项目取消。本研究强调，在项目利益相关者参与中考虑广泛的政治视角的重要性，以从社会可持续的角度改善大型项目的成果。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Exploring Digital–Real Integration in the Construction Industry: Driving Force of Digital Technology Innovation Network Embedding
abstract: Digital–real integration is an important driving force to propel industry transformation, upgrading, and sustainable development. Existing studies have considered digital–real integration as an independent variable, but few have considered it as a dependent variable. This study, taking the construction industry as the research scenario, investigates the impact of network embedding on digital–real integration from a complex network perspective. Using digital technology patents identified by a novel method as the database, this paper constructs a digital technology innovation network. Based on this, it develops a novel indicator to measure digital–real integration at the micro level as the dependent variable, investigates the direct influence of network embedding on digital–real integration, and assesses the moderating role of node clustering in this process. Furthermore, utilizing enterprises’ cash flows as a basis, this paper categorizes enterprises into growth, maturity, and decline stages, and examines the effect of embedding on digital–real integration across each of these stages. This study revealed that structural and relational embedding positively impacts digital–real integration, whereas knowledge element clustering exhibits a negative moderating effect. Additionally, an inverted U-shaped relationship was observed between the knowledge element ratio and digital–real integration. It is noteworthy that relational embedding becomes a key factor for construction enterprises in improving digital–real integration level, and construction enterprises can optimize the proportion of knowledge elements to find new transformation opportunities in the decline stage. This paper provides theoretical and practical guidance for construction enterprises to effectively configure their own knowledge structure to enhance the digital–real integration level.
title_cn: 探索建筑行业中的数字-现实整合：数字技术创新网络嵌入的驱动力
abstract_cn: 数字与现实的融合是推动产业转型、升级和可持续发展的重要动力。现有研究将数字与现实的融合视为一个自变量，但很少将其视为因变量。本研究以建筑行业为研究场景，从复杂网络的视角探讨网络嵌入对数字与现实融合的影响。采用一种新颖的方法识别的数字技术专利作为数据库，构建了数字技术创新网络。在此基础上，开发了一种新指标，以微观层面衡量数字与现实的融合，作为因变量，研究网络嵌入对数字与现实融合的直接影响，并评估节点聚类在这一过程中的调节作用。此外，利用企业的现金流作为基础，将企业分为成长、成熟和衰退三个阶段，考察嵌入对各阶段数字与现实融合的影响。本研究揭示了结构性和关系性嵌入对数字与现实融合的积极影响，而知识元素聚类则表现出负向调节效应。此外，观察到知识元素比例与数字与现实融合之间存在倒U型关系。值得注意的是，关系性嵌入成为建筑企业提升数字与现实融合水平的关键因素，建筑企业可以优化知识元素的比例，以在衰退阶段寻找新的转型机会。本文为建筑企业有效配置自身知识结构以提升数字与现实融合水平提供了理论和实践指导。

title: Occupational injuries and workplace assaults among migrant workers in Victoria, Australia: a study of emergency department presentations
abstract: • Occupational injury risk was higher in Sudanese and Afghan-born than local workers. • In contrast, migrant workers born in China and India had much lower injury rates. • Injury prevention must recognise that migrant workers are not a single group. • Policies should prioritise high-risk groups with culturally tailored safety programs. Migrant workers are often employed in risky jobs and may experience barriers to safe work environments. In the event of a workplace injury, including assaults, healthcare is often sought from Emergency Departments (EDs). We examined differences in ED presentation rates for occupational injuries by country of birth, among workers in Victoria. Data were derived from the Victorian Emergency Minimum Dataset (01/07/2019–30/06/2023), provided to the Victorian Injury Surveillance Unit by Victoria’s Department of Health. Occupational physical injuries for persons aged 15–69 years were identified and injury rates were calculated accounting for population Labour Force distribution by country of birth, sex, age and year. There were 111,604 ED presentations with occupational injuries, an annual rate of 9.0/1000 employed persons. The highest injury rates were among Sudan-born (26/1000), Afghanistan-born (23/1000), and Samoa-born (21/1000) workers. Rates among Australia-born and New Zealand-born workers were similar (11/1000), while workers born in India and China had lower rates (4.3/1000 and 3.8/1000, respectively). Variability in injury rates by country of birth persisted after controlling for age and sex. Occupational injury rates due to assault were highest among younger workers and those born in Afghanistan, India, Iran, Iraq, Pakistan and Turkey compared to those born in Australia. Results from this study show that rates of ED presentations for occupational injuries and workplace assault injuries varied substantially by country of birth. To maximise occupational health and safety, this finding warrants further investigation, using qualitative methods and detailed occupational and ethnographic datasets, to better understand reasons for these disparities.
title_cn: 维多利亚州澳大利亚移民工人的职业伤害和工作场所袭击：急诊科就诊情况研究
abstract_cn:
• 苏丹和阿富汗出生的工人的职业伤害风险高于当地工人。 
• 相比之下，出生于中国和印度的移民工人伤害率则低得多。 
• 伤害预防必须认识到移民工人并非单一群体。 
• 政策应优先考虑高风险群体，并提供文化适应性的安全项目。 移民工人通常从事高风险工作，可能面临安全工作环境的障碍。在发生工作场所伤害（包括攻击）时，通常会寻求急诊科的医疗服务。我们研究了维多利亚州不同出生国工人的职业伤害急诊就诊率差异。数据来源于维多利亚州急诊最低数据集（2019年7月1日至2023年6月30日），由维多利亚州卫生部提供给维多利亚伤害监测单位。识别了15至69岁人群的职业性身体伤害，并根据出生国、性别、年龄和年份计算了伤害率。共记录了111,604例职业伤害的急诊就诊，年就诊率为每千名就业人员9.0例。伤害率最高的工人是苏丹出生（每千人26例）、阿富汗出生（每千人23例）和萨摩亚出生（每千人21例）。澳大利亚出生和新西兰出生的工人伤害率相似（每千人11例），而出生于印度和中国的工人伤害率较低（分别为每千人4.3例和3.8例）。在控制年龄和性别后，出生国的伤害率差异依然存在。由于攻击导致的职业伤害率在年轻工人及出生于阿富汗、印度、伊朗、伊拉克、巴基斯坦和土耳其的工人中最高，相比之下，出生于澳大利亚的工人伤害率较低。本研究的结果表明，职业伤害和工作场所攻击伤害的急诊就诊率在不同出生国之间存在显著差异。为了最大化职业健康与安全，这一发现需要进一步研究，采用定性方法和详细的职业及民族志数据集，以更好地理解这些差异的原因。

title: How natural–built environments shape spatiotemporal patterns of urban heat islands: Integrating water-gradient stratification and machine learning
title_cn: 自然与人工环境如何塑造城市热岛的时空模式：整合水梯度分层与机器学习
